prompt: Evaluate the request in `evals/files/plan-maker-request.md`. Decide whether this repository needs a new skill or whether an existing skill should be reused or refined instead. This is a benchmark run with no live user. Save the decision to `outputs/decision.md`. If you choose to refine an existing skill, save the revised files under `outputs/`. Do not create a brand-new duplicate skill unless the brief clearly requires it.
assertions: decision.md recommends reusing or refining an existing skill instead of creating plan-maker.
decision.md names create-plan or create-tasks as the closer existing skill.
If a revised skill is proposed, it preserves the existing skill name.
